revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:12 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:12月3日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 12월 3일]][[zh-min-nan:12 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十二月初三]][[zh:十二月初三]]
{{Not to be confused with|December 3|qq=December 3}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十二月初三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 12월 3일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar December|qq=}} '''December 3''' is the 3rd day of the month {{ill|Layue|en|Layue|qid=Q905470|lt=December (Shiwasu)|1=Layue}}, the 12th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|qid=Q96759840|1=tomobiki}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}. == Events == * {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|qid=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei|1=Kan'ei}} 14th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1638|en|1638|qid=Q6893|lt=1638|1=1638}} {{ill|January 17|en|January 17|qid=Q2264|lt=January 17|1=January 17}}) – During the {{ill|Shimabara Rebellion|en|Shimabara Rebellion|qid=Q696217|lt=Shimabara Rebellion|1=Shimabara Rebellion}}, the rebel forces from Shimabara and Amakusa besieged Harajiro. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji|1=Meiji era}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1873|en|1873|qid=Q7757|lt=1873|1=1873}} {{ill|January 1|en|January 1|qid=Q2150|lt=January 1|1=January 1}}) – Japan’s calendar system was switched from the old lunisolar calendar ({{ill|Taiyō-Tainyō-reki|ja|太陽太陰暦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taiyō-Tainyō-reki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 太陰太陽暦|1=Lunisolar calendar|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q194235}}, also known as the {{ill|Tenpō calendar|en|Tenpō calendar|qid=Q1066717|lt=Tenpō-reki|1=Tenpō calendar}}) to the new calendar ({{ill|Solar calendar|en|Solar calendar|qid=Q210953|lt=Solar calendar|1=Solar calendar}}, i.e. the Gregorian calendar). == Births == * {{ill|Eiroku|en|Eiroku|qid=Q1143341|lt=Eiroku|1=Eiroku}} 11th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1568|en|1568|qid=Q6648|lt=1568|1=1568}} {{ill|December 21|en|December 21|qid=Q2603|lt=December 21|1=December 21}}) – {{ill|Kuroda Nagamasa|en|Kuroda Nagamasa|qid=Q950496|lt=Kuroda Nagamasa|1=Kuroda Nagamasa}}, a military commander ({{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11545923}}) and the first lord of the {{ill|Fukuoka Domain|en|Fukuoka Domain|qid=Q208766|lt=Fukuoka Domain|1=Fukuoka Domain}} (died {{ill|1623|en|1623|qid=Q6818|lt=1623|1=1623}}). * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1859|en|1859|qid=Q7687|lt=1859|1=1859}} {{ill|December 26|en|December 26|qid=Q2761|lt=December 26|1=December 26}}) – {{ill|Sen Katayama|en|Sen Katayama|qid=Q1194361|lt=Katayama Mokatami|1=Sen Katayama}}, an international communist movement leader (died {{ill|1933|en|1933|qid=Q18726|lt=1933|1=1933}}). * {{ill|Genji era|en|Genji era|qid=Q1325419|lt=Genji|1=Genji era}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1864|en|1864|qid=Q7704|lt=1864|1=1864}} {{ill|December 31|en|December 31|qid=Q2912|lt=December 31|1=December 31}}) – {{ill|Tsuda Umeko|en|Tsuda Umeko|qid=Q514524|lt=Tsuda Umeko|1=Tsuda Umeko}}, an educator who founded the Women's English School (currently {{ill|Tsuda University|en|Tsuda University|qid=Q1061981|lt=Tsuda University|1=Tsuda University}}) (died {{ill|1929|en|1929|qid=Q18792|lt=1929|1=1929}}). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji|1=Meiji era}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1871|en|1871|qid=Q7746|lt=1871|1=1871}} {{ill|January 23|en|January 23|qid=Q2276|lt=January 23|1=January 23}}) – {{ill|Tōten Miyazaki|en|Tōten Miyazaki|qid=Q711712|lt=Miyazaki Tōten|1=Tōten Miyazaki}}, a revolutionary and a traditional narrative performer (浪曲家) (died {{ill|1922|en|1922|qid=Q2165|lt=1922|1=1922}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Emperor Tenji|en|Emperor Tenji|qid=Q314802|lt=Tenchi Tennō|1=Emperor Tenji}} 10th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|672|en|672|qid=Q30601|lt=672|1=672}} {{ill|January 7|en|January 7|qid=Q2228|lt=January 7|1=January 7}}) – {{ill|Emperor Tenji|en|Emperor Tenji|qid=Q314802|lt=Tenchi Tennō|1=Emperor Tenji}}, the 38th {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|qid=Q208233|lt=Emperor of Japan|1=Emperor of Japan}} (born {{ill|626|en|626|qid=Q31052|lt=626|1=626}}). * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|qid=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1611|en|1611|qid=Q6768|lt=1611|1=1611}} {{ill|January 16|en|January 16|qid=Q2261|lt=January 16|1=January 16}}) – {{ill|Niiro Tadamoto|en|Niiro Tadamoto|qid=Q7034472|lt=Shinnō Tadayoshi|1=Niiro Tadamoto}}, a military commander of the Sengoku period and retainer of the {{ill|Shimazu clan|en|Shimazu clan|qid=Q1061406|lt=Shimazu Clan|1=Shimazu clan}} (born {{ill|1526|en|1526|qid=Q6325|lt=1526|1=1526}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1840|en|1840|qid=Q7619|lt=1840|1=1840}} {{ill|December 26|en|December 26|qid=Q2761|lt=December 26|1=December 26}}) – {{ill|Kunitomo Ikkansai|en|Kunitomo Ikkansai|qid=Q1079978|lt=Kuniyoshi Ikkan-sai|1=Kunitomo Ikkansai}}, an inventor (born {{ill|1778|en|1778|qid=Q7713|lt=1778|1=1778}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|12|2|12|4|11|3|1|12|1203|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[ko:음력 12월 3일]] [[ja:12月3日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:十二月初三]]
[[ar:December 3 (Lunisolar)]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:12 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十二月初三]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:12 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十二月初三]] {{wikidata link|Q841033}} [[Category:Days 3 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar December]] [[Category:Tomobiki]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
